summary: Interesting setlist but divided opinions on playing quality; recording source and sound quality are not documented.
review: The show receives mixed reactions – some listeners praise the fun atmosphere and a more intriguing setlist, while others criticize the performance as substandard. No reviewers comment on the audio source or fidelity, leaving the recording quality unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Two substantive reviews (one positive 5‑star, one moderate 3‑star) give a generally favorable impression of the performance despite some criticism; lack of recording details prevents a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist is considered more interesting than the previous night, but at least one reviewer feels the playing was below standard.
